_comment: Canonical contract for the botsite `/site-data.json` payload — the single source of truth the Python producer (botsite/site_data.build_site_data_payload + validate_site_data_payload) and the React consumer (design-system/src/app/data.ts, checked by data.test.ts) both validate against. A producer that renames/drops a key, or a consumer that reads a key not promised here, fails CI at the seam (the React-SPA migration plan §6 design<->data drift risk). Keys list the GUARANTEED fields; entries may carry additional optional fields the consumer treats as optional.
